question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists four main sections of the thesis but does not provide titles for each section.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes the contents of each section, providing a clear overview of what will be covered in each part. However, it could benefit from more specific details about the methods and analyses to be conducted.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis can be easily understood from this text. It clearly outlines the progression from theoretical background to practical application.
